---
species: "Membranipora membranacea"
accepted_code: "MEMA"
alternate_codes: ["bryozoan_encrusting_MEME"]
diminutive:
alternate_diminutives: 
common_name: "sea lace"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
description: "white, rectangular zooids" 
image: '/header_images/Membranipora_membranacea.jpg'
image_credit: 'Photo from Hans De Blauwe via [WORMS](https://images.marinespecies.org/thumbs/23731_membranipora-membranacea-linnaeus-1767.jpg?w=700)'
categories:
  - bryozoans
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_swath
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - bhi_rov
    - bhi_bruv
    - bhi_farms
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
catami_code: 20000901
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 111411
---


**Other images:** <!-- Other images with attribution -->
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** extremely small, colonies are papery, white or gray color growing directly on macroalgae, rectangular with spine like horns on its corners, prefers intertidal zone.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** 

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page](https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=111411)**
